title: The $20,000 API Key Mistake
summary: Keith AI presents a case study of a $20,000 incident involving improper API key handling. The video serves as a warning about the financial risks of security mismanagement in AI API usage.
writeup: Keith AI walks through a case study of a $20,000 incident caused by improper API key handling. The video frames the episode as a warning about the financial risks of security mismanagement in AI API usage. The core takeaways center on API integration practices and cost controls as defenses against runaway charges tied to mishandled keys.
